paragraph: The single-family market in Hasbrouck Heights is moving at a competitive pace with 25 sales over six months at a median of $725,000. Sellers are seeing strong interest, with 56 percent of homes selling above asking and a sale-to-list ratio of 1.02, which means homes are consistently hitting or slightly exceeding their listed price. Median days on market sits at 20 days, a pace that favors sellers willing to price realistically but doesn't lock buyers out entirely if they're flexible on timing. The range runs from $460,000 to $980,000, so there's genuine variety in what's available depending on condition, lot size, and location within town. If you're looking at single-family homes here, you'll want to move decisively on anything that checks your boxes, but you're not facing the frenzied multiple-offer environment some neighboring towns see. Priced homes are moving steadily.
